generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The idea that we can go it alone is dangerously naive. Our partners share the burden, but more importantly, they share our values. Cutting back now would embolden adversaries and leave us isolated. We've built this system over decades - let's not throw it away for short-term politics. #StrongerTogether #NATOWorks
